name: openreelio-codex
description: Use OpenReelio read-only MCP tools and video-editing guidance from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Plan OpenReelio edits through safe read-only project tools.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex with OpenReelio video-editing guidance plus read-only MCP access to host context, project metadata, timeline snapshots, command schemas, and validation tools.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this OpenReelio project and summarize the edit state.
Validate this OpenReelio command plan before I apply it.
Suggest a video edit plan for the current timeline.
